scripts.dev: concurrently -n SITE,LIB -c bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold "bun run site:dev" "bun run lib:dev"
scripts.dist: bun run lib:dist; bun run site:dist
scripts.preview: bun run dist; bun run --cwd packages/site preview;
scripts.test:run:docker-up: docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml up -d --wait && PW_TEST_CONNECT_WS_ENDPOINT=ws://localhost:3000/ playwright test
